title: Generated Agent README Contract
description: Canonical machine-readable contract for generated agent-facing runtime README structure only. This contract does not define runtime rendering logic, validator behavior, or operator README requirements.

includes: section-level intent for generated agent-facing READMEs

sections.intent: State the generated README mode so the agent can orient to the current runtime context.
Identify the first file or files the agent should open to begin reliable interpretation.
Point to the authoritative machine-readable files that govern structure, state, or interpretation.
Declare the deterministic order in which the agent should read the relevant artifacts.
List the main content-bearing files that the agent should use after establishing the source of truth.
Summarize the current validation state in a concise agent-usable form.
Explain how the agent should interpret warnings relevant to navigation, trust, or content use.
